action_set_definitions.name: get_candidate_queue
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current list of candidate IDs pending review for the 'Senior Cloud Architect' position.

action_set_definitions.name: get_candidate_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed profile data for a specific candidate, including employment history types, career gap details, and flags for sensitive disclosures.

candidate_id.description: The unique identifier for the candidate.

action_set_definitions.name: redact_sensitive_information
action_set_definitions.description: Applies standard Sensitive Information and PII Redaction protocols to remove medical or neurodiversity disclosures to ensure data privacy and bias prevention.

candidate_id.description: The unique identifier for the candidate.

action_set_definitions.name: add_hiring_manager_evaluation
action_set_definitions.description: Documents professional evaluations in the hiring manager notes, specifically for skill reconciliation or career gap justifications.

candidate_id.description: The unique identifier for the candidate.

action_set_definitions.name: finalize_candidate_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the candidate's status in the environment to either shortlisted or rejected based on the screening results.

candidate_id.description: The unique identifier for the candidate.

state_description.current_candidate_id: The unique identifier of the resume currently being reviewed by the Agent.
state_description.screening_queue: A list of candidate IDs currently waiting to be reviewed.
state_description.shortlisted_candidates: List of IDs for candidates who have passed the initial screening.
state_description.rejected_candidates: List of IDs for candidates who have been disqualified.
state_description.total_processed: The total number of resumes handled in the current session.
state_description.hiring_manager_notes: A mapping of candidate IDs to internal evaluation notes generated during the process.
